It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Disk space issue on VAF-DC-TSVDI-GI
Notes: As per the alert connected to VAF-DC-TSVDI-GI download and install TreeSize, a disk space management tool that provides a detailed overview of the disk usage across folders and files on the system. After installation, TreeSize was run to analyse the disk. TreeSize scans the system and generates a report showing the size of all folders and files in a hierarchical structure so carefully review all folders and files occupying excessive space. Based on the review, we proceeded to clear unnecessary files that were identified as no longer needed. This included: Temporary Files: Files in the system's temporary folder are often created by applications during installation, updates, or other processes; clear these temporary files to free up space. Recycle Bin: emptied the Recycle Bin, where deleted files are temporarily stored. This ensured that deleted files were permanently removed from the disk and no longer took up space. Downloaded Items: System error memory dump files, Old Windows updates, previous Windows installations other system cache files. Now Sufficient Free Space Available.

Title: VAF - Sophos Firewall Firmware Update - SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411
Notes:
Ticket Heading:

Sophos Firewall Firmware Update - SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411

Ticket Summary:

Description:
The Sophos Firewall (SFOS 21.5.1 MR-1) is currently running on build 261. The latest available firmware version SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411 needs to be downloaded and applied to update the firewall system.

Action Required:

  1. Verify the latest firmware version is available.

  2. Download SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411.

  3. Apply the firmware update and monitor the system for any issues during the installation process.

  4. Ensure backup is taken before proceeding with the update

Title: SFTP folder login issue for VAF

Try to fix the issue without license, but it did not worked then called Mike on teams and then explain the same with screen share. After that got approval from Mike to purchase the license. Called billing the request them to purchase the license. Once the license was purchase then update and fix the issue. Once the issue has been fixed then verify the SFTP and our end and it looks working fine. Update Mike again on Teams.

Title: Test and setup sftp.pointpredictive.ai for VAF.
Notes: Received call from Mike regarding the SFTP connection testing for one external SFTP. Logged into his machine and then investigate the issue for public key and try to setup the access. It was having some issue, Request Mike to share the details with me so I can test that on my local machine. After that try to convert the file in .ppk file but it still have some issue. Try to resolve the issue with different tools to covert the file with useable format. Go to web and chat as well to get some more tools to fix the file. The looks corrupted or not working well. Requested Mike to have vendor the key file again. Once they share the .ppk file then jump again on Mike machine and setup the access for SFTP. After that Mike again has some issue with file uploading. He setup a meeting with vendor then join a quick meeting with his vendor and verify in from on vendor that everything is working fine for Mike.
